title: Move extraction fields to ServerConfig and remove thrustcurve_cache_path
description: Remove thrustcurve_cache_path from ServerConfig (dead code). Move extraction_mode and extraction_endpoints from EventConfig to ServerConfig since Ollama extraction servers are a deployment-level resource shared across all events.
acceptance_criteria: thrustcurve_cache_path field removed from ServerConfig dataclass
extraction_mode and extraction_endpoints fields added to ServerConfig
extraction_mode and extraction_endpoints removed from EventConfig
load_event_config() no longer parses extraction_mode and extraction_endpoints
event_manager.py passes extraction config from ServerConfig to ExtractionService

findings.approach: Added optional extraction_mode and extraction_endpoints kwargs to ExtractionService.__init__ to allow override from ServerConfig while maintaining backward compat with AppConfig in legacy/single-event path
